rows.label: tlk43300049_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Hah hah haa! Coming here means
you want to use the inn, yes?

rows.label: tlk43300049_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Good, good! Use it all you like!
I'll allow any purpose!

rows.label: tlk43300049_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Hah hah haa! A pleasant waking,
right? Our inn feels different!

rows.label: tlk43300049_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Won't you stay the night?
It's been building up, hasn't it?
Fatigue, I mean.
